label: Parallel
description: Fan out to all outgoing branches and execute them in parallel. Returns each branch's result + an aggregate success rate.

settings.name: minSuccessRate
settings.label: Minimum Success Rate
settings.description: Lowest acceptable fraction of successful branches (0.5 = half must succeed). Falls below this and the node fails its outputAssertion.

ai.shortDescription: Fan out to multiple branches and run them in parallel.
ai.whenToUse: When you want to execute several independent sub-workflows simultaneously and continue once the configured success threshold is met.
ai.examplePrompt: run the enrichment step and the notification step in parallel
ai.promptHints: Connect multiple output edges to different downstream nodes. The node fails its outputAssertion if fewer than minSuccessRate fraction of branches succeed.

outputAssertions.name: parallel_branches_returned
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Parallel node returned no branch results — verify the node has outgoing edges.

outputAssertions.name: parallel_min_success_rate
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Parallel node's success rate fell below the configured minSuccessRate threshold — too many branches failed.
